source: Aggregated from public deal sites (Doctor of Credit, Upgraded Points, Cards & Points, Bankrate, The Points Guy)

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back on purchases at Shake Shack, up to $4 cash back. BankAmeriDeals offer available to eligible Bank of America credit and debit card holders.
offers.terms: Payment made directly with merchant. Valid one time only. Digital wallets and delivery services may not qualify.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $100 or more on Hilton hotel stays, up to $65 cash back. Book directly through Hilton.
offers.terms: Direct booking with Hilton only. One-time use. Payment made directly with merchant.

offers.description: Earn 5% cash back on Dell.com purchases, up to $100 cash back. Great for electronics, monitors, laptops, and accessories.
offers.terms: Dell.com purchases only. One-time use. Payment made directly with merchant.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back on CVS Pharmacy purchases, up to $5 cash back. Works in-store and on CVS.com.
offers.terms: In-store and CVS.com. One-time use. Payment made directly with merchant.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back when you spend $40 or more per purchase at Topgolf, up to $40 cash back.
offers.terms: Per-purchase minimum of $40. One-time use. In-store at Topgolf locations.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back on Five Guys purchases, up to $3 cash back.
offers.terms: In-store and online orders. One-time use. Payment made directly with merchant.

offers.description: Earn 10% cash back on Turo car rental bookings. Book through turo.com or the Turo app.
offers.terms: Turo.com or Turo app. One-time use. Targeted offer.

offers.description: Earn 5% cash back on purchases at Food Lion grocery stores, up to $5 cash back. Available through BankAmeriDeals and also seen on Chase and U.S. Bank Offers.
offers.terms: In-store at Food Lion locations. One-time use. Targeted BankAmeriDeals offer.

offers.description: During Double Days in April, earn double cash back on select BankAmeriDeals offers. Typically features popular merchants with doubled rewards for a limited window.
offers.terms: Select BankAmeriDeals offers only. Double Days typically run for a limited period in April. Check your app for eligible deals.

offers.description: Earn coins with each BankAmeriDeal redeemed (1 coin per deal on $3+ purchases). Collect 4 coins to earn $5 bonus cash back and level up for greater rewards at higher levels.
offers.terms: Enrolled BankAmeriDeals members. 1 coin per qualifying deal ($3+ purchase). 4 coins per level. Cash back increases at higher levels.

offers.description: Choose gas as your 3% category on the Customized Cash Rewards card and earn 3% back at all gas stations, on the first $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter. Preferred Rewards members can earn up to 5.25%.
offers.terms: Customized Cash Rewards card only. Choose gas as your 3% category. First $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter, then 1%. Preferred Rewards boosts up to 5.25%.

offers.description: Choose online shopping as your 3% category on the Customized Cash Rewards card. Earn 3% back on online purchases from most retailers. Preferred Rewards members can earn up to 5.25%.
offers.terms: Customized Cash Rewards card only. Choose online shopping as your 3% category. First $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter. Preferred Rewards boosts up to 5.25%.

offers.description: Choose dining as your 3% category on the Customized Cash Rewards card. Earn 3% back at restaurants, fast food, and delivery services. Preferred Rewards members can earn up to 5.25%.
offers.terms: Customized Cash Rewards card only. Choose dining as your 3% category. First $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter. Preferred Rewards boosts up to 5.25%.

offers.description: Choose travel as your 3% category on the Customized Cash Rewards card. Earn 3% back on airlines, hotels, car rentals, and more. Preferred Rewards members can earn up to 5.25%.
offers.terms: Customized Cash Rewards card only. Choose travel as your 3% category. First $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter. Preferred Rewards boosts up to 5.25%.

offers.description: Choose home improvement & furnishings as your 3% category on the Customized Cash Rewards card. Covers Home Depot, Lowe's, furniture stores, and more. Preferred Rewards up to 5.25%.
offers.terms: Customized Cash Rewards card only. Choose home improvement & furnishings as your 3% category. First $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter.

offers.description: Choose drugstores as your 3% category on the Customized Cash Rewards card. Covers CVS, Walgreens, Rite Aid, and other pharmacies. Preferred Rewards members up to 5.25%.
offers.terms: Customized Cash Rewards card only. Choose drugstores as your 3% category. First $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter.

offers.description: Automatically earn 2% cash back at grocery stores and wholesale clubs on the first $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter with the Customized Cash Rewards card. No category selection needed.
offers.terms: Customized Cash Rewards card. Always-on — no activation needed. First $2,500 in combined purchases per quarter, then 1%.

offers.description: Starting May 26, 2026, Preferred Rewards becomes BofA Rewards with new tiers. Preferred Plus ($30K+) gets 25% boost, Preferred Honors ($100K+) gets 50% boost, Premier ($1M+) gets 75% boost on all cash back earnings.
offers.terms: Based on combined BofA/Merrill balances. Tiers: Preferred Plus ($30K-$100K), Preferred Honors ($100K-$1M), Premier ($1M+). Changes effective May 26, 2026.
